---
description: "Styling conventions for token usage, responsive behavior, consistency, and accessible visual design."
applyTo: "**/*.html, **/*.css, **/*.js, **/*.ts, **/*.jsx, **/*.tsx, **/*.vue"
---

# Styling Instructions

- Prefer existing design tokens, components, and theme conventions.
- Use Tailwind utilities consistently.
- Avoid one-off CSS unless needed.
- Keep spacing, typography, and layout consistent.
- Ensure responsive behavior on mobile, tablet, and desktop.
- Preserve accessible color contrast.
- Use animation only when it improves comprehension or usability.
- Keep visual hierarchy clear with restrained accent usage.
- Apply color intentionally; avoid hot-color-heavy backgrounds.
- Favor semantic styling choices over arbitrary utility combinations.
